checks.name: Total photos stored
checks.command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM photos

checks.name: Max photos by a single user
checks.command: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(photo_count), 0) AS value FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS photo_count FROM photos GROUP BY user_id)

checks.name: Top uploaders (name + count)
checks.command: SELECT u.name || ' (' || COUNT(*) || ' photos)' AS value FROM photos p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id GROUP BY p.user_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 5

checks.name: Total registered users
checks.command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM users

checks.name: Banned users
checks.command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM users WHERE banned = 1

checks.name: RSVPs: Yes
checks.command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM rsvps WHERE rsvp = 'yes'

checks.name: RSVPs: No
checks.command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM rsvps WHERE rsvp = 'no'

checks.name: R2 object count
checks.note: R2 free tier: 1M Class A ops/month (writes/deletes), 10M Class B ops/month (reads), 10 GB storage. Op counts visible in Cloudflare dashboard → R2 → lorraine-90th-photos → Metrics.

checks.name: R2 estimated storage (from DB metadata)
checks.command: SELECT ROUND(SUM(size) / 1048576.0, 2) AS value FROM photos
checks.note: Requires a 'size' column in the photos table. If not present, check R2 dashboard directly. 10 GB free tier = 10240 MB.

checks.name: R2 Class A / Class B operation counts
